name: font_google_families
description: خطوط جوجل للتحميل: أسماء متعددة مفصولة بفاصلة كما في موقع Google Fonts.
default: DM Sans, Almarai, Manrope, Montserrat, Nunito, Playfair Display, Instrument Sans

name: font_google_weights
description: أوزان الخطوط (للكل): مثل 400;500;600;700

name: font_family_primary
description: النص الأساسي — بدلاً من DM Sans.

name: font_family_ui
description: إعلانات وواجهة ضيقة — بدلاً من Manrope.

name: font_family_alt
description: نص ثانوي وتسميات — بدلاً من Nunito.

name: font_family_display
description: عناوين عرض كبيرة — بدلاً من Playfair Display.

name: font_family_arabic
description: العربية — بدلاً من Almarai. للخطّ الواحد للعربي والإنجليزي اكتب نفس اسم «النص الأساسي».

name: font_family_announce
description: شريط الإعلان (Announcement) — افتراضي DM Sans.

name: enable_theme_animations
description: تفعيل حركات وانتقالات الثيم (ظهور عند التمرير، سليدر تلقائي، ماركي الإعلان، إلخ). عطّله لإيقاف كل الأنيميشن دفعة واحدة.

name: store_product_card_background
description: خلفية بطاقة المنتج (الشبكة، القائمة، الرئيسية، ذات الصلة) — Store product card background.

name: product_card_sale_badge_bg
description: كروت المنتجات: خلفية بادج التخفيض (مثل -20%).

name: product_card_sale_badge_text
description: كروت المنتجات: لون نص بادج التخفيض.

name: product_card_custom_badge_bg
description: كروت المنتجات: خلفية البادج المخصص (من إعدادات المنتج — مثل New).

name: product_card_custom_badge_text
description: كروت المنتجات: لون نص البادج المخصص.

name: header_hamburger_icon
description: Header: mobile menu (hamburger) image URL.

name: header_search_icon
description: Header: search button image URL (desktop + mobile search row).

name: header_cart_icon
description: Header: cart button image URL.

name: header_close_icon
description: Header: mobile drawer close button image URL.

name: header_nav_chevron_icon
description: Header: chevron image next to menu items that open a dropdown (desktop).

name: header_pages_menu_label
description: Header: label for the dropdown that lists store pages (editable by merchant).

name: header_pages_chevron_icon
description: Header: arrow next to the Pages label on desktop (hover dropdown).

name: header_pages_mobile_arrow_icon
description: Header: arrow on the Pages row in the mobile drawer (opens submenu on tap).

name: header_language_menu_label
description: Header (mobile drawer): عنوان قسم اللغة (مثل Pages).

name: header_language_fallback_label
description: إذا لم تُضف لغات يدوياً: نص السطر داخل القائمة الفرعية الذي يفتح واجهة اللغة في المنصة.

name: header_language_options
description: لغات تظهر تحت «Language» في الدرج (اسم المعروض + رابط التبديل، مثل المسار الذي يوفّره ملحق تعدد اللغات).

name: footer_quick_links
description: Footer: column title above categories.

name: footer_customer_support
description: Footer: column title above pages.

name: footer_contact_us
description: Footer: column title above contact.

name: footer_phone_label
description: Footer: label above phone.

name: footer_email_label
description: Footer: label above email.

name: footer_address_label
description: Footer: label above address.

name: footer_subscribe_emails
description: Footer: newsletter heading.

name: footer_email_placeholder
description: Footer: newsletter input placeholder.

name: footer_subscribe_newsletter_btn
description: Footer: newsletter button.

name: footer_powered_by
description: Footer: text before powered-by link.

name: footer_payment_custom_image
description: Footer: optional payment strip image URL. Empty uses store payment image.

name: footer_about_title
description: Footer (Sleek): About column heading.

name: footer_about_text
description: Footer (Sleek): About column body copy.
default: We only carry designs we believe in ethically and aesthetically – original, authentic pieces that are made to last.

name: footer_about_button
description: Footer (Sleek): About column CTA label (e.g. Learn more).

name: footer_about_page_id
description: Simple page the CTA opens (link URL is resolved on the storefront)

name: reviews_heading_fallback
description: Reviews: section heading fallback.

name: reviews_share_cta_fallback
description: Reviews: write-review button fallback.

name: reviews_count_word
description: Reviews: word after the count.

name: reviews_load_more_label
description: Reviews: load-more button.

name: reviews_empty_message
description: Reviews: empty state.

name: reviews_anonymous_name
description: Reviews: name when missing.

name: reviews_avatar_placeholder
description: Reviews: avatar letter fallback.

name: reviews_read_more_label
description: Reviews: expand long text.

name: reviews_show_less_label
description: Reviews: collapse expanded text.

name: categories_header_subtitle
description: Categories section: small eyebrow above the heading (left column). If unset or blank in saved theme data, the default below is shown in the storefront.

name: categories_header_title
description: Categories section: main heading (left column). If unset or blank in saved theme data, the default below is shown in the storefront.

name: categories_section_description
description: Categories showcase: paragraph under the heading (left column). If unset or blank in saved theme data, the default below is shown in the storefront.
default: Thoughtfully chosen routines and essentials to care for your skin every day.

name: categories_items_label
description: Categories cards: word after the product count (e.g. items / منتجات).

name: categories_carousel_prev_label
description: Categories carousel: aria-label for the previous button (desktop).

name: categories_carousel_next_label
description: Categories carousel: aria-label for the next button (desktop).

name: list_products_card_cta_label
description: Product list (split cards): pill text on each card. Replaces storefront “shop” / View All label for this section.

name: grid_products_view_all_label
description: شبكة أصناف الرئيسية: نص رابط «عرض الكل» بجانب العنوان. افتراضي: Shop All Products — يمكن تغييره.

name: grid_products_view_all_arrow_url
description: Product grids (home + collection): “view all” / shop_now arrow image URL.

name: grid_products_quick_add_icon_url
description: Home grid & filtered collection list: optional quick-add icon image URL. Empty uses built-in SVG plus.

name: grid_products_choose_options_label
description: Product cards (grids, lists, related): quick-add pill label on desktop hover. If unset or blank in saved theme data, the theme falls back to the storefront quick-add string then «Choose options».

name: product_card_search_icon_url
description: كروت المنتجات: أيقونة البحث/العرض السريع (شاشات كبيرة عند الهوفر فقط).

name: product_card_choose_label
description: كروت المنتجات: نص مخصص لزر التسمية على سطح المكتب (الهوفر) بدل النص الافتراضي. إذا كان فارغاً أو غير محفوظ: يُستخدم grid_products_choose_options_label ثم نص الإضافة السريعة من المنصة ثم «Choose options».

name: product_card_show_swatches
description: كروت المنتجات: إظهار دوائر ألوان/صور المتغيرات على الكارت. عطّله لإخفائها.

name: sale_badge_label
description: Sale badge: word before discount %. Empty uses platform default.

name: thanks_title_fallback
description: Thank-you page: heading fallback.

name: thanks_subtitle_fallback
description: Thank-you page: subtitle fallback.

name: thanks_confirmation_prefix
description: Thank-you page: text before customer email.
default: The order confirmation has been sent to

name: pdp_shipping_note
description: PDP: optional line under price (e.g. Shipping calculated at checkout). Empty hides.

name: pdp_stock_message
description: PDP: optional inventory line under short description (merchant-written). Empty hides.

name: pdp_stock_pulse
description: PDP: show animated green dot before pdp_stock_message.

name: pdp_trust_lines
description: PDP: icon + text rows under price block (e.g. free shipping, returns).

fields.name: text
fields.description: Line copy next to the icon.

name: pdp_pairs_well_heading
description: PDP: heading above manual cross-sell cards.

name: pdp_pairs_well
description: PDP: manual cross-sell cards (image URL, title, link slug or URL, optional category + price label).

fields.name: url
fields.description: Full URL or product slug (slug becomes /products/{slug})

fields.name: category
fields.description: Category label on the card (e.g. Lipstick)
